title: Healthy Costco Foods
description: Honest reviews of Kirkland Signature and other Costco staples — separating the genuinely smart buys from the ones whose health-halo marketing doesn't hold up.
intro: Costco's bulk format makes the choice between a smart staple and a regret-purchase higher stakes — you're committing to a hundred servings, not one. Here's our running review of Kirkland Signature snacks and other Costco regulars, scored against their nutrition labels, not their packaging.

sections.title: Costco Pantry Staples
sections.description: Brands like Kashi and Nature Valley that show up in most Costco runs.
